title: ranunculus ellipes
intro: Ranunculus ellipes, also known as Creeping Buttercup, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family, characterized by its small, delicate flowers and creeping stems. The plant is known to have medicinal properties due to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Ranunculus ellipes has been found to possess health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, protect against cell damage, and combat infections. The herbal preparations of Ranunculus ellipes include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat conditions like eczema, acne, and wounds.
